title: The Ass and the Grasshopper
lines: An Ass complained to a Grasshopper about the noise he made.
'Why do you chirp all day long?' asked the Ass.
'Do you not tire of making such a racket?'
'We have our own way of living," replied the Grasshopper.
'Just as you eat grass, I eat songs.'
'My noise disturbs you, but it is the song of my life.'
moral: All creatures have their own ways and purposes.
